title: galium rubrum subsp. balearicum
intro: Galium rubrum subsp. balearicum, also known as the Balearic bedstraw, is a subspecies of the Galium rubrum plant, belonging to the Rubiaceae family of flowering plants. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used to treat various health issues, including rheumatic and arthritic conditions, thanks to its anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Galium rubrum subsp. balearicum include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, or it can be used in tincture or powder form, making it a versatile addition to herbal remedies.
